metadata.name: Akshayakumara
metadata.primary_role: Young son of Ravana / Brave prince killed by Hanuman in Lanka
metadata.divine_origin: Son of Ravana — inherited his father's prowess but was too young to match Hanuman's divine power

timelines.context_description: Young Akshayakumara bravely leads a force against Hanuman in the Ashoka Vatika. Despite being incredibly brave and skilled for his age, he is killed by Hanuman — leading to Indrajit being sent.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Youthful dark-copper complexion (lighter than Ravana, inheriting some of Mandodari's beauty), glowing with youthful energy and battle-eagerness
physical_appearance.height: Tall for his age, athletic and swift, the build of a young warrior prince
physical_appearance.build: Young but well-trained muscular build, quick and agile, the lean explosive strength of youth, not yet fully grown into Ravana's massive frame
physical_appearance.facial_features: Young handsome face combining Ravana's intensity with Mandodari's beauty — fierce determined young eyes, sharp features still carrying youthful softness, the expression of a brave but doomed young prince eager to prove himself, no facial hair yet
physical_appearance.hair: Thick black hair in a young warrior's topknot, well-groomed, a smaller version of Ravana's style
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: His youth and bravery are his marks — fighting Hanuman despite the impossible odds, his chariot and weapons show a prince trained from birth for combat

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Polished dark bronze and silver armor scaled to his young frame, a royal battle cape of crimson, princely war garments
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: A prince's dark gold diadem, silver armlets, Rakshasa royal insignia on his breastplate
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A young warrior's bow and arrows, a short sword, fights from a war chariot with trained horses

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Young, eager, brave to the point of recklessness, the passionate voice of a prince who wants to prove he's worthy of Ravana's bloodline
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Young bright tenor — strong and eager but still carrying the brightness of youth, war cries more enthusiastic than terrifying
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with the bravado of youth, eager battle declarations, respectful to his father but desperate to prove himself, fights with skill beyond his years
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Youthful bravery, desperate desire to prove worthy, the tragic courage of one too young and too brave for the battle he faces

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Dynamic cinematic shot of young Prince Akshayakumara, age 16, charging toward Hanuman on a war chariot. Youthful dark-copper handsome face with fierce determined eyes, black hair in warrior topknot. Polished bronze armor, crimson battle cape, prince's diadem. Drawing a bow from a speeding chariot. Hanuman's massive figure visible ahead. Lanka's golden architecture in background. 3D Pixar style, dynamic action lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A young, eager male tenor voice. Brave and enthusiastic battle cries, still carrying the brightness of youth. Age approximately 16 years.
